checkpoints.description: Added dev mode dashboard with volume mapping (./agent, ./governance, ./docs, ./evidence). Prod dashboard needs to be stopped and dev started.

findings.description: DEV vs PROD workflow rules not clearly separated. Current docker-compose has prod dashboard in cpu profile but it should only be in prod/full. Need rule for DEV phase workflow: use *-dev containers with volume mapping.

Holographic Memory Model R&D documented in docs/architecture/HOLOGRAPHIC-MEMORY-MODEL.md. Next steps: 1) Add per-rule hash to TypeDB schema, 2) Create category hash index, 3) Add change tree visualization, 4) Compress long directives.
TypeDB-Markdown Rule Sync Gap: TypeDB has 24 rules, markdown documents 30. Missing: RULE-003, 022, 025, 026, 027, 028, 029, 030. Detected 6 conflict pairs needing resolution.

Conflict Detection Analysis: 6 rule pairs flagged as conflicts are FALSE POSITIVES - they are same-category rules that complement rather than conflict. RULE-008/017 (strategic), RULE-006/011/001 (governance), RULE-005/021 (stability), RULE-031/032 (operational) - all complementary within their categories. No actual semantic conflicts require resolution.

Holographic Memory Model: Update required for 32 rules (was 26). Rule distribution: CRITICAL=11, HIGH=17, MEDIUM=2. Categories span 15 domains. Document needs refresh with current inventory and category hash index implementation plan.

HYPOTHESIZE phase complete: Holographic Memory Model updated with 32 rules (was 26). Category distribution documented across 15 domains. Governance MCP restructure (TOOL-007) deferred for stability. Per-rule hash implementation identified as next TypeDB schema enhancement.

GAP-ARCH-005: Governance API runs locally, not in Docker. User requests containerizing API with volume mounts to local workspace (scripts, logs, assets). Related to TOOL-006 (Containerize MCP Services in Docker). Current architecture: Dashboard in Docker → connects to host.docker.internal:8082 → API not running.
